en: I don't recall what I got for my first Christmas.
ko: 첫 크리스마스에 무슨 선물을 받았는지 기억나지 않아. 첫 야외 피크닉이 언제였는지도 모르겠어.

en: I don't know when I went on my first outdoor picnic.
ko: 첫 크리스마스에 무슨 선물을 받았는지 기억나지 않아. 첫 야외 피크닉이 언제였는지도 모르겠어.

en: But I do remember the first time I heard the sweetest voice in the wide world.
ko: 하지만 그 달콤한 목소리를 처음 들었던 건 기억나.

en: You can sit here if you want.
I had never seen anything so beautiful in my life. She was like an angel.
ko: 내 인생에서 그렇게 아름다운 것을 본 적이 없었어.

en: We're going to sit down, aren't you?
What's wrong with your legs?
I'm nothing at all, thank you.
ko: 너 무슨 문제 있어? 아무것도 아니야, 고마워.

en: My legs are just fine and dandy.
ko: 내 다리는 아주 멀쩡해. 그냥 버스에서 예쁜 여자 옆에 앉았을 뿐이야.

en: I just sat next to her on that bus and had a conversation all the way to school.
My back's crooked like a question mark.
These are going to make me a straight marrow.
Next to Mama, no one ever talked to me or asked me questions.
ko: 엄마, 아무도 나한테 말을 걸거나 질문을 한 적이 없었거든.

en: Are you stupid or something?
Mama said as stupid as a stupid does.
I'm Jenny.
I'm Forrest. Forrest Gump.
From that day on we was always together Jenny and me was like peas and carrots She taught me how to climb
ko: 그날부터 우리는 항상 함께였어. 제니와 나는 콩과 당근 같았지. 제니가 나무 타는 법을 가르쳐줬어.

en: Come on, Forrest, you can do it!
ko: 어서, 포레스트, 넌 할 수 있어!

en: I showed her how to dangle.
Good little mother.
She helped me learn how to read.
ko: 제니는 내가 글 읽는 법을 배우게 도와줬어.

en: And I showed her how to swing.
ko: 그리고 나는 그네 타는 법을 보여줬어.

en: Sometimes we just sit out and wait for the stars.
ko: 가끔은 그냥 밖에 앉아서 별이 뜨길 기다렸어.

en: Mama's going to worry about me.
Just stay a little longer.
For some reason, Jenny didn't ever want to go home.
ko: 왠지 모르겠지만, 제니는 절대 집에 가고 싶어하지 않았어.

en: OK, Jenny, I'll stay.
She was my most special friend.
